metadata.title: Fibidy — Open your store. Sell today.
metadata.description: The fastest way for Indonesian creators and small businesses to launch a digital storefront. Build your catalog, share your link, customers order via WhatsApp. Free during beta.

announcement.messageDesktop: 🚀 Fibidy is live in beta — open your store free in 5 minutes.
announcement.messageMobile: 🚀 Fibidy beta — open your store free.

hero.headline: Open your store. Sell today.
hero.subheadline: No coding, no setup fees. Build your catalog, share your link, and let customers order straight via WhatsApp.
hero.trustLine: Free during beta · 5 minutes to launch · WhatsApp-first ordering

commission.title: Marketplaces eat 20% of every order
commission.description: Your hard work shouldn't fund someone else's growth. Keep more of what you earn.

expensiveSlow.title: Custom websites are slow and pricey
expensiveSlow.description: Quotes start at Rp 5 million and take weeks to ship. By then the trend is gone.

notLocal.title: Tools weren't built for Indonesia
notLocal.description: Foreign platforms charge in USD, ignore WhatsApp, and don't speak your customers' language.

features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.subheadline: Six tools that turn an idea into your first sale today.

studio.title: Studio: drag-drop your storefront
studio.description: Build a landing page that mirrors your brand — pick a hero, drop in product blocks, swap the colors. No designer, no developer, no waiting.

multiTenant.title: Your own subdomain or custom domain
multiTenant.description: Launch at your-name.fibidy.com or plug in tokomu.com — your call, your brand.

whatsapp.title: Order via WhatsApp, built in
whatsapp.description: Customers tap one button and they're chatting with you on WA. No card friction, no checkout drop-off.

theme.title: Brand colors, your way
theme.description: Pick the primary color that matches your packaging, your logo, your vibe — applied across every page.

seo.title: SEO-ready out of the box
seo.description: Sitemap, OpenGraph cards, JSON-LD — handled. Your products show up clean on Google, WhatsApp shares, and Instagram links.

mobile.title: Mobile-first, by default
mobile.description: Most of your customers shop on a phone. Every page already works perfectly there — no extra config.

pricing.headline: Three plans. One ladder. Honest pricing.
pricing.subheadline: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. Same plans you see post-signup — no surprise upsells.
pricing.roadmapNote: Digital downloads, KYC payouts, and the per-tier platform fees are still being polished. Marked as Coming Soon below — we'll switch them on for everyone at the same time when paid plans launch.

storeBuilder.eyebrow: Try it first, sign up later
storeBuilder.headline: Your store, in 30 seconds. See it live.
storeBuilder.subheadline: Pick a category, claim your address, watch your storefront build itself. No signup until you like what you see.

states.available: Available! Your store is ready to launch.
states.invalid: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
states.reserved: This name is reserved by the system.

storeBuilder.trustLine: Sign up in 2 minutes · No credit card needed

isFree.a: Yes — free during beta, no card required, no trial expiry. We're focused on shipping a great product right now; paid plans land later this year. When they do, beta sellers get early-supporter pricing.

paymentNoStripe.q: How do I get paid if Stripe isn't live yet?
paymentNoStripe.a: Customers tap 'Order via WhatsApp' on your storefront — you take it from there. Bank transfer, OVO, GoPay, COD — whatever works for you and the customer. Fibidy doesn't touch the money. Direct payouts via Stripe IDR are coming with paid plans.

customDomain.q: Can I use my own domain?
customDomain.a: Yes — Fibidy supports custom domains. Point tokomu.com at us and we'll handle the rest. Or stay on your-name.fibidy.com — your call.

betaRoadmap.a: Targeting late 2026. Paid plans bring direct Stripe IDR payouts, digital product downloads, and seller analytics. Beta sellers get a thank-you discount when we ship them.

fibidyVsLinktree.q: How is Fibidy different from Linktree?
fibidyVsLinktree.a: Linktree is a list of links. Fibidy is a real catalog: product photos, prices, categories, search, custom domain — all built in. Plus customers can order from you directly via WhatsApp, not bounce to another site.

whatToSell.q: What can I sell on Fibidy?
whatToSell.a: Physical goods (fashion, food, crafts), services (coaching, consultations, salon, studio time) — anything customers can buy from you via WA today. Digital products (templates, ebooks, courses) are coming with paid plans.

dataExport.q: Can I export my products if I leave?
dataExport.a: Yes. Your data is yours. CSV export of all your products is on the roadmap; in the meantime, our team helps any seller migrate out manually if they ask.

migrate.q: Can I move from another platform?
migrate.a: Yes. Bring your product photos, descriptions, and prices over — Fibidy doesn't lock you in. Beta sellers get hands-on migration help: ping us and we'll do the lifting.

finalCta.headline: Start today. Your store is ready in 5 minutes.
finalCta.subheadline: Free during beta. No credit card. Order via WhatsApp from day one.
finalCta.trustLine: Already have an account? Sign in from the menu above.

footer.tagline: The fastest way to launch your storefront in Indonesia.

softwareApp.name: Fibidy
softwareApp.description: Open your storefront in 5 minutes. Build your catalog, share your link, and let customers order via WhatsApp. Free during beta for Indonesian creators and small businesses.
